page: Microsoft Azure DC64as_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCASv5 server family. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor with an x86_64 architecture. The system is provisioned with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. This instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached storage. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. There are no graphics processing units bundled with this configuration, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio provide predictable resource density for enterprise workloads. The absence of local storage and GPU hardware reduces overhead for workloads that do not require local caching or hardware acceleration. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, relational databases utilizing external premium storage, web serving at scale, and application servers.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCASv5 family, featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or integrated graphics processing units, but it is Premium Storage capable to support external persistent disk configurations. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities for multi-threaded applications. This hardware profile is designed for workloads such as enterprise-scale web serving, application servers, and database systems relying on external storage solutions.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC64as_v5 is a general-purpose VM with 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability on Hyper-V.
tagline: A dedicated 64-vCPU virtual machine with 256 GB of RAM and premium external storage compatibility for balanced enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
256.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per vCPU)
No local storage, with Premium Storage capability for external disks
Suitable for enterprise application servers and database workloads
